message:
feat(ftui-harness): add input_storm module for stress-testing terminal input handling

Introduce input_storm module providing high-throughput input event
generation for stress-testing the terminal input pipeline under load.
Re-export via lib.rs.

Add e2e_input_storm.rs end-to-end test exercising the input storm
harness against the full rendering stack.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
